feed.title: whimsysoul
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from whimsysoul

entry.title: They just make so much sense! #denmark #copenhagen #copenhagentiktok #copenhagenlife #unitedstates #recycle #sustainability #dansk #danmark

entry.title: Wanna make money while traveling Europe? Or sleeping? Get a @Flodesk email newsletter!! I’ve been using Flodesk for 5 years to deliver exclusive content right to my community. A website and an email newsletter subscriber lists are the only two touch poin
entry.content: Wanna make money while traveling Europe? Or sleeping? Get a @Flodesk email newsletter!! I’ve been using Flodesk for 5 years to deliver exclusive content right to my community. A website and an email newsletter subscriber lists are the only two touch poin

entry.title: Those Bridgerton boys are 🥵 & yes, that bee was a paid actor. 🐝 If I'm ever invited to tea at Bridgerton Manor I'm looking for hotties with a title 💅 😉 I'm so excited for season 3!!!! I'm still in Europe and am staying at this beautiful hotel in the Swe
entry.content: Those Bridgerton boys are 🥵 & yes, that bee was a paid actor. 🐝 If I'm ever invited to tea at Bridgerton Manor I'm looking for hotties with a title 💅 😉 I'm so excited for season 3!!!! I'm still in Europe and am staying at this beautiful hotel in the Swe

entry.title: wish i packed some sequins 🤧this gorgeous castle is the Gripsholm Slott about an hour outside Stockholm! #abba #stockholm #sweden #gripsholmsslott #waterloo #whimsysoul
entry.content: wish i packed some sequins 🤧this gorgeous castle is the Gripsholm Slott about an hour outside Stockholm! #abba #stockholm #sweden #gripsholmsslott #waterloo #whimsysoul

entry.title: The best bakery in Copenhagen 🤤 wish i bought more of those miso cookies ngl #copenhagen #copenhagenlife #copenhagenfood #denmark #dansk #whimsysoul #andersonbakery #islandsbrygge #food
entry.content: The best bakery in Copenhagen 🤤 wish i bought more of those miso cookies ngl #copenhagen #copenhagenlife #copenhagenfood #denmark #dansk #whimsysoul #andersonbakery #islandsbrygge #food

entry.title: doing this on every vacation from now on ❤️ wayyy better than selfies. We ended up wearing these outfits to see Eurovision and got so many compliments, too! ❤️ We're both wearing head-to-toe @Sézane (I'm a Size 12 + 14 with their pieces, btw!) 👉 Did yo

entry.title: Ditch the sad beige, find your magic! ⭐️ Join me for hidden gems around California & the world, colorful outfits, definitely too much wine and tons of whimsy from your neighborhood ginger. (P.S. there’s a cabin…) @Whimsy Homes Cabin Oh, and more bingo. I

entry.title: Replying to @seanlawn breaking news! Second square is off the world cruise bingo card! Shoutout to @joe for alerting us today. What square do we think will be next? #ultimateworldcruise #worldcruise #bingo #worldcruisebingo #whimysoul #royalcaribbean #cr
